title: limodorum flos-aeris
intro: Limodorum flos-aeris, also known as the "Fly Orchid" or "Fly Catcher," is a type of orchid native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limodorum flos-aeris include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Limodorum flos-aeris typically involve making infusions or tinctures from the plant's roots and leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
